vocab.meaning: nảy mầm, mọc lên nhanh chóng
vocab.example: I remember the pure excitement of seeing the first tiny green shoots sprout up from the soil after weeks of waiting.

vocab.meaning: chết dần chết mòn (thường nói về cả một nhóm cây hoặc cành)
vocab.example: Unfortunately, during a particularly harsh heatwave, most of my delicate seedlings began to die off.

vocab.meaning: phát triển mạnh mẽ nhờ vào cái gì đó
vocab.example: The ferns we planted in the shaded corner of the garden seemed to thrive on the damp and cool conditions there.

vocab.meaning: lớn nhanh như thổi, tăng vọt về chiều cao
vocab.example: Once we added some organic compost, the sunflowers started to shoot up, eventually reaching higher than the fence.

vocab.meaning: khô cạn, bị héo do thiếu nước
vocab.example: I had to be very careful not to let the potting mix dry out completely during the peak of summer.

vocab.meaning: mang vào trong nhà (để bảo vệ khỏi thời tiết)
vocab.example: When the storm clouds gathered, I’d quickly bring in my small pots of herbs to keep them safe from the heavy downpour.

vocab.meaning: cắt bỏ, ngắt bỏ (những phần không cần thiết)
vocab.example: My grandmother taught me to cut off the withered blooms to encourage the plant to produce more flowers.

vocab.meaning: giúp sức, hỗ trợ quá trình phát triển
vocab.example: I used small wooden stakes to help the climbing beans along as they began to spiral upward.

vocab.meaning: dọn dẹp sạch sẽ (rác, lá rụng, cỏ dại)
vocab.example: Every weekend, I would clear away the fallen leaves and debris to keep my little garden patch looking tidy.
The best part of growing potatoes was the harvest day when I got to dig up the tubers hidden beneath the earth.
